name: Mend Spirit
description:
Invoke the Rites of Moawita, replacing your Light and Heavy Attacks with healing abilities that only can be used on allies.

Your Light Attacks heal for 972.

Your Heavy Attacks heal for 863 every 1 second, and restore 1155 Magicka to you for successfully healing.

After you heal an ally you grant them Major Resolve, increasing their Physical and Spell Resistance by 5948 for 5 seconds.
